atlas.put_in: membrane<->metabolism mutual-production laws + drive S; 'die if an arm is cut' not put in
emerged: break membrane -> [0.0035, 0.0001] (death); stop metabolism -> [0.0001, 0.0035] (death) -- EITHER arm kills
a critical drive S_c=0.06 separates life from death
surprises: necessity of BOTH arms is emergent: the loop, not either part alone, is the living unit
atlas.persistence: coexistence only while both arms run and the drive flows
atlas.not_scripted_check: death follows from knocking out a production term; no death rule is written
atlas.claim_tier: measured (coexistence, both-arm death, critical S) ; interpretive (autopoietic closure) ; analogy (membrane/metabolism/life)
floors: minimal kinetic model (not a spatial membrane); 'membrane/metabolism/life' is analogy; not a cell
fixed parameters; we did NOT make life
